title: Brent crude holds above $100 as Trump says U.S. may hit Iran's oil hub again 'just for fun'
summary_full: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.
summary_public: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation
